rationale: The citing paper centers on share-of-wallet contracting and explicitly examines whether such contracts favor dominant firms or can aid smaller-firm innovation diffusion, while the cited paper is a core empirical test of slotting allowances as efficiency-enhancing vs anticompetitive. That thematic overlap in vertical contracting/competition mechanisms makes the citation plausibly foundational or theory-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though the raw match is only a DOI reference.
